headlines.headline: Spurs' Victor Wembanyama to travel while in concussion protocol
headlines.description: Victor Wembanyama will travel with the Spurs to Portland for games this weekend, even while continuing to complete the steps mandated by the concussion protocol.

headlines.headline: Falcons' James Pearce offered intervention program to avoid trial
headlines.description: The Falcons' James Pearce Jr. has agreed to enter an intervention program, allowing him to avoid trial on felony charges stemming from an alleged incident with WNBA player Rickea Jackson.

headlines.headline: Bettors divided on Bailey, Reese as No. 2 pick in NFL draft
headlines.description: The betting market has been set on Fernando Mendoza going first in Thursday's NFL draft for months. But who will be the second pick, a selection owned by the Jets, is a different story. The odds on the second pick have moved dramatically in recent weeks.

headlines.headline: How working with Travis Kelce's coach ignited Seydou Traore's NFL dream
headlines.description: While many of the NFL's International Player Pathway Program (IPPP) players have entered the program with little to no knowledge of American football, Seydou 'Ziko' Traore is as league-ready as a prospect from London could be.
